name: SuggestionList
description: Swipeable pager of follow-suggestions — labelled block where each page shows three rows of (avatar + name + meta lines + trailing Follow toggle). Built around the recommendation pattern (suggested channels, suggested people, suggested companies, suggested topics) but the anatomy is content-neutral. Single-spec family. Historically shipped as ChannelList; that name is kept as a deprecated alias.
wrapperGuidance: Owns its inline padding internally. Place as a direct child of the page-shell <main> (or any host that pays the gutter once). Do NOT wrap in a padding-inline div, className="px-*", or style={{ padding }} — the page rail is paid once at the shell, never on the full-bleed child. Inside a bounded surface (Dialog / BottomSheet / SideSheet), apply the negative-margin opt-out — see AGENTS.md § Composition rules.

standalone.context: Direct child of the page shell or any host that pays the page-rail gutter once.

embedded.trigger: prop `embedded={true}` on <SuggestionList /> OR direct child of `.chorus-section` / `.chorus-feed` (DOM-ancestry safety net).
embedded.context: Composed inside another rail-responsible host (`<Section label="Recommended"><SuggestionList embedded /></Section>`). Row content takes over from the host's content-box edge.
